grid.note_cross_model: Cross-model transfer: correct strategies may come from any source model, not necessarily the receiving model.
grid.note_source_homogeneity: All correct-strategy selections happen to come from GPT-4o because that model reached the deepest generation in the v0.3 corpus. This is an artifact of which models were run longest, not a design choice. The cross-model transfer claim holds (strategies compressed by GPT-4o are tested on Claude and Gemini), but the source-model diversity is zero. A future run should select per-(source_model, task, budget) to test whether source model identity affects transfer.
